## Type of Change

<!-- Mark applicable items with [x] -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code quality improvement (formatting, refactoring)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `npm run tsc` and confirmed 0 TypeScript errors
- [ ] I have run `npx prettier --check extensions/*.ts` and confirmed formatting is clean
- [ ] I have searched for existing issues and PRs before creating this one
- [ ] My changes are focused and do not include unrelated modifications
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README, docs, etc.) if necessary
